programme.title: Twisted Sister
programme.desc: Strange things start happening when Emily meets a woman who claims to be her half sister.

programme.title: What Happened to My Sister?
programme.desc: A college freshman rushes a sorority to uncover the truth about her sister's death.

programme.title: Beyond the Headlines: The Elizabeth Thomas Story With Elizabeth Smart
programme.desc: Elizabeth Thomas shares new revelations about her ordeal with kidnapping survivor Elizabeth Smart.

programme.title: Framed by My Sister
programme.desc: Twins Reina and Alex find their lives upended by their mysterious triplet.

programme.title: Envy: A Seven Deadly Sins Story
programme.desc: A woman who seemingly has it all stands to lose everything to her devious half sister.

programme.title: Buying Back My Daughter
programme.desc: A couple try to buy back their daughter to rescue her from the trafficker who abducted her.

programme.title: My Life Is a Lifetime Movie
programme.desc: A woman begs for the return of her husband after he vanishes.

programme.title: Framed by My Sister
programme.desc: Twins Reina and Alex find their lives upended by their mysterious triplet.

programme.title: My Life Is a Lifetime Movie
programme.desc: A woman begs for the return of her husband after he vanishes.

programme.title: The Last Thing She Said
programme.desc: A young woman's new friendship with an elderly cleaning lady turns uneasy, then dangerous.

programme.title: Fatal Memories
programme.desc: A woman tries to help her sister remember the events surrounding the stabbing death of their mother.

programme.title: Danger on Party Island
programme.desc: A lawyer suspects foul play when she travels to an infamous island to collect her sister's body.

programme.title: My Life Is a Lifetime Movie
programme.desc: A woman starts a high-end escort agency; a woman finds a reality star living in her parents' home.
